nasb.text: And they *said to me, “You must prophesy again concerning many peoples and nations and tongues and kings.”

esv.text: And I was told, “You must again prophesy about many peoples and nations and languages and kings.”

cnv.text: 他們又對我說：“論到許多民族、邦國、方言和君王，你必須再說預言。”

ccb.text: 那天使又对我说：“你必要再对许多民族、国家、语言族群、君王说预言。”

csbs.text: 然后他们对我说：“你必须指着许多民族、国家、语言群体和君王再说预言。”
